ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal Of The Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terrence Murphy for Barbara Westgate.

Mr. Murphy stated that his client's brother sent the copy of the will to her, that there were no debts, no tax liabilities and no medical liens as he was fully covered by Kaiser. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). the bond is set at $10,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
